landing.title: Capital of Fusion
landing.subtitle1: Discover the world of Bachata like never before.
landing.subtitle2: An interactive 3D experience at the heart of dance.

artistEdit.title: Edit artist
artistEdit.photoHint: — Profile photo can be changed in Django admin if needed (image file).
artistEdit.bioFallbackHint: On the site, if a language is empty, the French version is shown as fallback.
artistEdit.translateNeedFrBio: Enter the French biography text to translate first.

theory.subtitle: Rhythm, technique, history and culture — everything you need to know to dance with awareness and sensitivity.

rythme.label: Rhythm & Music
rythme.description: Understand the clave, count the beats and hear the musical structure of bachata.

technique.label: Technique
technique.description: Connection, body waves, posture, lead & follow — movement fundamentals.

histoire.label: History
histoire.description: Dominican origins, pioneers and the global evolution of bachata.

culture.label: Culture
culture.description: Social dance etiquette, international community and values of social dance.
